steps.title: Scaffold the 6-question interview
steps.verification: contract: each question emits a stable key (q1..q6) + answer recorded as JSONL line in .prd/interview-<slug>.log

steps.title: Persist answers + emit interview-recap
steps.verification: scenario: walk all 6 questions, assert recap renders non-empty

steps.title: Generate Claude-side plugin manifest
steps.verification: contract: .claude-plugin/plugin.json parses; schema matches Claude plugin spec

steps.title: Generate Codex-side plugin manifest
steps.verification: contract: .codex-plugin/plugin.json parses; schema matches Codex plugin spec

steps.title: MCP shape adapter
steps.verification: contract: both .mcp.json pass mcp-shape validator; server names mirror across both

steps.title: Author SKILL.md from interview Q1+Q4
steps.verification: scenario: SKILL.md frontmatter parses; description mirrors Q1 (intent) and references Q4 (verification)

steps.title: Author scenario test from interview Q1+Q4
steps.verification: scenario: scenario dry-run returns intent-key match against Q1

steps.title: AC1/2/3 self-check + registration checklist
steps.verification: scenario: AC1=green, AC3=green, AC2=manual-pending. Registration checklist present.
